data.current_summary: Get vehicle details by registration number
data.current_description: Returns vehicle details based on registration number
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve vehicle details by registration number
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive vehicle information from the DVLA database using the vehicle's registration number. Accepts a VehicleRequest containing the registration number and additional query parameters. Returns a Vehicle object containing up to 21 vehicle attributes including make, model, colour, registration status, and other DVLA-held details. This operation queries live DVLA records and does not modify any data. Requires valid registration number format.
